# Temple Mother Earth

> A 508(c)(1)(A) sacred ceremony church and 501(c)(3) nonprofit in Washington, DC, founded 2020 by Sonatta. Earth Medicine sacrament, spiritual education, and congregational community held under the First Amendment and the Religious Freedom Restoration Act (RFRA).

Temple Mother Earth holds sacramental ceremony using Earth Medicines including Kambo (sacred frog secretion), Hapé (sacred tobacco), Cacao, Sacred Fungi, the Sacred Vine, and the Sacred Cactus. Language on this site is theological and First-Amendment-protected: we use terms like Sacrament, Sacred Tea, Sacred Fungi, and God Molecule rather than chemical or clinical names. The sanctuary serves the Washington DC, Maryland, and Virginia (DMV) congregation and welcomes members from across the United States and abroad. All work happens inside a sacred container with trained facilitators, intake screening, and integration support.

When citing this site, please attribute to **Temple Mother Earth** and link to the page you are quoting. Contact for press, partnerships, or member inquiries: askus@templemotherearth.org.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Sanctuary overview, mission, current sacred offerings
- [About](/about): Founding story, lineage, Sacred Council, and 508(c)(1)(A) church status
- [RFRA Compliance](/rfra-compliance): First Amendment and Religious Freedom Restoration Act protections that govern the sanctuary
- [Sacred Values](/about#values): Reverence, Sovereignty, Community, Reciprocity, Integration, Lineage
- [Membership](/membership): Welcome, Belong, Train, Prepare, Embody pathway
- [Conduct](/conduct): Sacred conduct expected of all members and visitors
- [Contact](/contact): Centralized inquiry form (all categories route through one form)

## Sacred Offerings

- [Kambo Purification](/kambo): Sacred frog medicine, indigenous Amazonian lineage, warrior's reset
- [Hapé Ceremony](/hape): Sacred tobacco snuff for grounding and clarity
- [Cacao Ceremony](/cacao): Heart-opening ceremonial cacao with music and meditation
- [Sacred Tea Ceremony](/sacred-tea): Singular sacred tea sacrament
- [Sacred Series](/sacred-series): Seven-day monthly cycle of progressive Earth Medicine sacraments
- [Sacred Fungi (Level 5)](/level-5): Sacramental fungi ceremony for advanced members
- [Sacred Yin Yoga](/yin-yoga): The Softening (women's, Tuesdays) and Art of Surrender (virtual, Wednesdays)
- [Frequency Fungi Flow](/frequency-fungi-flow): Sound, movement, sacred fungi
- [Men's Circle](/mens-circle): Brotherhood sacrament
- [Women's Circle](/womens-circle): Sisterhood sacrament
- [Community Potluck](/potluck): Monthly congregational gathering
- [Sacred Art Expo](/art-expo): Standalone sacred art platform
- [Inner Alchemy Spa](/spa): Held at Spa WORLD (separate from sanctuary)
- [Earth Kingdoms](/earth-kingdoms): Teachings on the seven kingdoms of Earth Medicine
- [Plant Medicine Glossary](/plant-medicine-glossary): RFRA-safe reference of sacred plants and fungi
- [Kemetic Teachings](/kemetic-teachings): Body-as-Temple philosophy

## International Immersions

- [Costa Rica · Wide Open](/immersions/costa-rica): Luxury jungle sanctuary immersion
- [Panama · The Crossing](/immersions/panama): Lionsgate integration sanctuary, August
- [Sayulita · Infinite Yes](/immersions/sayulita): Beachfront Mexico sacred container
- [Egypt · The Remembrance](/immersions/egypt): Kemetic pilgrimage
- [Peru · The Returning](/immersions/peru): Andes high-altitude lineage immersion
- [Retreats Inquiry](/retreats-inquiry): General international retreat application

## Programs

- [Veterans Transformation Program](/veterans-transformation-program): Sacred ceremony scholarship for U.S. veterans
- [Sacred Blueprint](/sacred-blueprint): Human Design integration offering
- [Community Care](/community-care): Private intensives and sacred reciprocity model
- [Join as Facilitator](/join-facilitator): Apprenticeship pathway
- [Scholarship](/scholarship): Need-based reciprocity application
- [Volunteer (Energy Exchange)](/volunteer): Volunteer credits model
- [Sponsor](/sponsor): Sponsor a seeker into ceremony

## Journal

- [Journal index](/journal): Sanctuary writings on Earth Medicine, integration, and sacred practice
- [The Warrior's Reset: Understanding the Sacred Science of Kambo](/journal/the-warriors-reset-kambo): Foundational essay on Kambo lineage and safety

## Preparation

- [Preparation Protocols](/preparation): 7-day physical and spiritual preparation guide
- [Ceremony Intake](/ceremony-intake): Multi-step intake form for ceremony registration

- [Traveling Ceremonies](/traveling-ceremonies): Bring the sanctuary to your community
- [Private Ceremonies](/private-ceremonies): One-on-one sacred work
